ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patient_thyroid_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M for male, F for female, ? for unknown) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "on_thyroxine" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is on thyroxine medication */,
  "query_on_thyroxine" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has been queried for thyroxine use */,
  "on_antithyroid_medication" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is on antithyroid medication */,
  "sick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is sick */,
  "pregnant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is pregnant */,
  "thyroid_surgery" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has had thyroid surgery */,
  "i131_treatment" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has had I131 treatment */,
  "query_hypothyroid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has been queried for hypothyroidism */,
  "query_hyperthyroid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has been queried for hyperthyroidism */,
  "lithium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is on lithium medication */,
  "tumor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has a thyroid tumor */,
  "hypopituitary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has hypopituitarism */,
  "psych" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has a psychiatric condition */,
  "tsh_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if TSH levels have been measured */,
  "tsh" REAL /* TSH levels (nanograms per deciliter) */,
  "t3_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if T3 levels have been measured */,
  "t3" REAL /* T3 levels (nanograms per deciliter) */,
  "tt4_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if TT4 levels have been measured */,
  "tt4" REAL /* TT4 levels (micrograms per deciliter) */,
  "t4u_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if T4U levels have been measured */,
  "t4u" REAL /* T4U levels */,
  "fti_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if FTI levels have been measured */,
  "fti" REAL /* FTI levels */,
  "tbg_measured" INTEGER /* Indicates if TBG levels have been measured */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Detailed medical history of the patient */,
  "current_medications" TEXT /* List of current medications */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last visit */,
  "next_appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled appointment */,
  "BMI" REAL /* Body Mass Index */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status (e.g., never, former, current) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status (e.g., none, moderate, heavy) */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of thyroid disorders */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the patient referral */,
  "class" TEXT /* Diagnosis or class of thyroid condition (e.g., compensated_hypothyroid, negative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)
